prompt:
Subject: travel collage

Person/Expression: Short black bob, rounded glasses, translucent natural makeup, a soft and intellectual expression, a calm atmosphere suggesting quiet curiosity.

Clothing/Pose: White short-sleeved blouse, pale blue-green long skirt, thin suspenders, brown shoulder bag, standing with a classic camera around the neck and a small travel notebook in one hand. Small clones of the same person are arranged around, showing actions like writing in the notebook, reading a map, organizing stamps, and looking into the distance.

Background/Light: A scrapbook-style background based on a retro wooden board, layered with local railway maps, old tickets, travel photos, pressed flowers, handwritten notes, stamps, old books, information cards, and train window scenery. Soft summer natural light, with a slightly nostalgic and warm atmosphere.

Composition/Camera: Vertical 9:16, poster-like composition with the main character placed large in the center, a collage structure with small scenes scattered in a balanced way, layer expression with a paper cut-and-paste feel, high-definition screen showing fine details.

Texture/Style: High-definition, 4K quality, gentle touch of hand-drawn illustration, retro collage expression conveying the texture of paper, elegant color scheme based on deep blue-green and brown, magazine cover-level completion, delicate and warm travel worldview.

Negative: Low quality, unnatural face, unnatural hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, distorted fingers, strange gaze, asymmetrical eyes, collapsed face, distorted body, broken clothes, excessive processing, excessive skin correction, excessive exposure, unnatural background, unreadable characters, typos, logos, watermarks.
